HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Searching...
No Matches

Go to the documentation of this file.

6#include "SimJob.h"
7#include <iostream>
8#include <map>
9#include <mutex>
10#include <thread>
11#include "iofunctions.h"
12
13// Be sure to include all possible domain types here:
14#include "DomainHom3D.h"
15#include "DomainLayered3D.h"
16#include "DomainHom3DPer.h"
17
18// Incident types go here:
19#include "IncidentField.h"
20#include "PlaneWave.h"
21
22// Construct an empty job (no mesh or domains yet).
23SimJob::SimJob() : isCasimirJob(false), thereIsALookupTable(false) {}
24
25// Destructor: frees owned domains and lookup table if present.
26SimJob::~SimJob() {
27 std::vector<Domain *>::iterator domIter;
28 for (domIter = domains.begin(); domIter != domains.end(); domIter++)
29 delete *domIter;
30 delete t;
31}
32
38int SimJob::LoadFromFile() {
39 bool hasMesh(false);
40 bool hasLabel(false);
41 jobParser.readTag();
42 int domainCounter(0);
43 if (jobParser.getTag() == "job") {
44 std::string symStatus;
45 while (jobParser.lastRead() != "/job") {
46 jobParser.readTag();
47 if (jobParser.getTag() == "periodic") {
48 if (isCasimirJob) {
49 std::cout << "Error: Casimir force computation not implemented for "
50 "periodic structures."
51 << std::endl;
52 return 1;
53 }
54 symStatus = jobParser.getTag();
55 LoadPeriodicity();
56 }
57
58 if (jobParser.getTag() == "label") {
59 hasLabel = !LoadLabel();
60 }
61 if (jobParser.getTag() == "mesh") {
62 if (symStatus == "periodic") {
63 hasMesh = !LoadMeshPer();
64 } else {
65 hasMesh = !LoadMesh();
66 }
67 if (!hasMesh) {
68 std::cout << "Error: job missing mesh." << std::endl;
69 return 1;
70 }
71 }
72 if (jobParser.getTag() == "wavelength") {
73 LoadWavelength();
74 }
75 if (jobParser.getTag() == "domain") {
76 ++domainCounter;
77 if (domainCounter > mesh->MaxDomainIndex()) {
78 std::cout << "Error: too many domains in job file." << std::endl;
79 return 1;
80 }
81 if (symStatus == "periodic") {
82 LoadDomainPer();
83 } else {
84 LoadDomain();
85 }
86 }
87 if (jobParser.getTag() == "domainLayers") {
88 ++domainCounter;
89 if (domainCounter > mesh->MaxDomainIndex()) {
90 std::cout << "Error: too many domains in job file." << std::endl;
91 return 1;
92 }
93 LoadDomainLayered();
94 }
95 if (jobParser.getTag() == "periodicdomain") {
96 ++domainCounter;
97 if (domainCounter > mesh->MaxDomainIndex()) {
98 std::cout << "Error: too many domains in job file." << std::endl;
99 return 1;
100 }
101 if (symStatus == "periodic") {
102 LoadDomainPer();
103 } else {
104 std::cout << "Error: periodic domain in non-periodic job."
105 << std::endl;
106 return 1;
107 }
108 }
109 if (jobParser.getTag() == "nonperiodicdomain") {
110 ++domainCounter;
111 if (domainCounter > mesh->MaxDomainIndex()) {
112 std::cout << "Error: too many domains in job file." << std::endl;
113 return 1;
114 }
115 LoadDomain();
116 }
117 if (jobParser.getTag() == "planewave") {
118 if (isCasimirJob) {
119 std::cout << "Error: Casimir force computation does not support "
120 "illumination."
121 << std::endl;
122 return 1;
123 }
124 LoadPlanewave();
125 }
126 if (jobParser.getTag() == "dipole") {
127 if (isCasimirJob) {
128 std::cout << "Error: Casimir force computation does not support "
129 "illumination."
130 << std::endl;
131 return 1;
132 }
133 LoadDipole();
134 }
135 if (jobParser.getTag() == "gaussian") {
136 if (isCasimirJob) {
137 std::cout << "Error: Casimir force computation does not support "
138 "illumination."
139 << std::endl;
140 return 1;
141 }
142 LoadGaussian();
143 }
144 }
145 }
146
147 if (!hasLabel) {
148 std::cout << "Error: job missing label." << std::endl;
149 return 1;
150 }
151 if (domainCounter < mesh->MaxDomainIndex()) {
152 std::cout << "Error: too many domains in mesh file." << std::endl;
153 return 1;
154 }
155 std::cout << "Finished reading job" << std::endl;
156 return 0;
157}
158
159// Parse one @f$<subjob>...</subjob>@f$ section (label + incident field).
160int SimJob::LoadSubjobFromFile() {
161 bool hasLabel(false);
162 jobParser.readTag();
163 if (jobParser.getTag() == "subjob") {
164 std::cout << "Reading subjob ..." << std::endl;
165 while (jobParser.lastRead() != "/subjob") {
166 jobParser.readTag();
167 if (jobParser.getTag() == "label") {
168 hasLabel = !LoadLabel();
169 }
170 if (jobParser.getTag() == "planewave") {
171 LoadPlanewave();
172 }
173 if (jobParser.getTag() == "dipole") {
174 LoadDipole();
175 }
176 if (jobParser.getTag() == "gaussian") {
177 LoadGaussian();
178 }
179 }
180 if (!hasLabel) {
181 std::cout << "Subjob missing label!" << std::endl;
182 return 1;
183 }
184 std::cout << "Finished reading subjob." << std::endl;
185 } else
186 return 1;
187 return 0;
188}
189
190// Read @f$<label>@f$ and push to labels vector.
191int SimJob::LoadLabel() {
192 labels.push_back(jobParser.read<std::string>());
193 std::cout << "Job name: " << labels.back() << std::endl;
194 jobParser.readTag();
195 return 0;
196}
197
198// Load a surface mesh (non-periodic).
199int SimJob::LoadMesh() {
200 mesh = new SurfaceMesh;
201 int err(mesh->LoadFromFile(jobParser.read<std::string>()));
202 if (err == 1) return err;
203 std::cout << "Expecting " << mesh->MaxDomainIndex() << " domains."
204 << std::endl;
205 jobParser.readTag();
206 return 0;
207}
208
209// Load a surface mesh and register periodic translations.
210int SimJob::LoadMeshPer() {
211 mesh = new SurfaceMesh;
212 for (unsigned int i(0); i < latticeVectors.size(); ++i) {
213 mesh->NewTranslation(latticeVectors[i]);
214 mesh->NewTranslation(-latticeVectors[i]);
215 }
216 int err(mesh->LoadFromFile(jobParser.read<std::string>()));
217 if (err == 1) return err;
218 std::cout << "Expecting " << mesh->MaxDomainIndex() << " domains."
219 << std::endl;
220 jobParser.readTag();
221 return 0;
222}
223
224// Read vacuum wavelength λ0.
225int SimJob::LoadWavelength() {
226 vacuumWavelength = jobParser.read<dcmplx>();
227 std::cout << "Vacuum wavelength: " << vacuumWavelength << "nm." << std::endl;
228 jobParser.readTag();
229 return 0;
230}
231
232// Add a homogeneous domain (ε, μ).
233int SimJob::LoadDomain() {
234 dcmplx epsilon(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
235 dcmplx mu(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
236 Domain *ptr;
237 std::cout << "Domain " << domains.size() << ": dielectric permittivity "
238 << epsilon << " and magnetic permeability " << mu << std::endl;
239 ptr = new DomainHom3D(mesh, domains.size(), epsilon, mu, vacuumWavelength);
240 domains.push_back(ptr);
241 jobParser.readTag();
242 return 0;
243}
244
245// Add a layered domain (@f$<domainLayers>...<layer>...@f$ entries).
246int SimJob::LoadDomainLayered() {
247 jobParser.readTag();
248 std::vector<dcmplx> epsilonIn;
249 std::vector<dcmplx> muIn;
250 std::vector<double> zValsIn;
251 while (jobParser.lastRead() != "/domainLayers") {
252 if (jobParser.getTag() == "layer") {
253 dcmplx epsilon(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
254 dcmplx mu(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
255 epsilonIn.push_back(epsilon);
256 muIn.push_back(mu);
257 jobParser.readTag();
258 }
259 if (jobParser.getTag() == "interface") {
260 double zValIn(jobParser.read<double>());
261 zValsIn.push_back(zValIn);
262 jobParser.readTag();
263 }
264 jobParser.readTag();
265 }
266 Domain *ptr;
267 std::cout << "Layered domain (" << domains.size() << ") bottom to top layers :" << std::endl;
268 for (int i = 0; i < epsilonIn.size(); i++)
269 {
270 std::cout << "->Layer " << i + 1 << ":"
271 << " dielectric permittivity = " << epsilonIn.at(i)
272 << " and magnetic permeability = " << muIn.at(i) << std::endl;
273 if (i < epsilonIn.size() - 1) {
274 std::cout << "--Interface: z = " << zValsIn.at(i) << std::endl;
275 }
276 }
277 ptr = new DomainLayered3D(mesh, domains.size(), epsilonIn, muIn, zValsIn, vacuumWavelength);
278 domains.push_back(ptr);
279 jobParser.readTag();
280 return 0;
281}
282
283// Add a periodic domain block (consistency-checked).
284int SimJob::LoadDomainPer() {
285 dcmplx epsilon(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
286 dcmplx mu(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
287 Domain *ptr;
288 std::cout << "Domain " << domains.size() << ": dielectric permittivity "
289 << epsilon << " and magnetic permeability " << mu << std::endl;
290 if (latticeVectors.size() != 0) {
291 ptr = new DomainHom3DPer(mesh, domains.size(), epsilon, mu,
292 vacuumWavelength, blochVector, latticeVectors);
293 } else {
294 std::cout << "Error in lattice definition" << std::endl;
295 return 1;
296 }
297
298 if (thereIsALookupTable) {
299 ptr->InitLookupTable(t);
300 }
301 domains.push_back(ptr);
302 jobParser.readTag();
303 return 0;
304}
305
306// Read @f$<planewave>@f$ block and attach to a domain.
307int SimJob::LoadPlanewave() {
308 jobParser.readTag();
309 rvec propagation(0, 0, 0);
310 cvec polarization(0, 0, 0);
311 int domainIndex(0);
312 while (jobParser.lastRead() != "/planewave") {
313 if (jobParser.getTag() == "propagation") {
314 double f1(jobParser.read<double>());
315 double f2(jobParser.read<double>());
316 double f3(jobParser.read<double>());
317 propagation = f1, f2, f3;
318 propagation /= sqrt(dot(propagation, propagation));
319 jobParser.readTag();
320 }
321 if (jobParser.getTag() == "polarization") {
322 dcmplx c1(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
323 dcmplx c2(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
324 dcmplx c3(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
325 polarization = c1, c2, c3;
326 jobParser.readTag();
327 }
328 if (jobParser.getTag() == "domain") {
329 int din(jobParser.read<int>());
330 domainIndex = din;
331 jobParser.readTag();
332 }
333 jobParser.readTag();
334 }
335 domains[domainIndex]->AddPlaneWave(vacuumWavelength, propagation,
336 polarization);
337 std::cout << "Adding plane wave to domain " << domainIndex << std::endl;
338 return 0;
339}
340
341// Read @f$<dipole>@f$ block and attach to a domain.
342int SimJob::LoadDipole() {
343 jobParser.readTag();
344 rvec location(0, 0, 0);
345 cvec polarization(0, 0, 0);
346 while (jobParser.lastRead() != "/dipole") {
347 if (jobParser.getTag() == "location") {
348 double f1(jobParser.read<double>());
349 double f2(jobParser.read<double>());
350 double f3(jobParser.read<double>());
351 location = f1, f2, f3;
352 jobParser.readTag();
353 }
354 if (jobParser.getTag() == "polarization") {
355 dcmplx c1(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
356 dcmplx c2(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
357 dcmplx c3(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
358 polarization = c1, c2, c3;
359 jobParser.readTag();
360 }
361 jobParser.readTag();
362 }
363 Domain *inDom(ContainingDomain(location));
364 inDom->AddDipole(location, polarization);
365 int domIndex(inDom->Index());
366 std::cout << "Adding dipole to domain " << domIndex << std::endl;
367 return 0;
368}
369
370// Read @f$<gaussian>@f$ block and attach to a domain.
371int SimJob::LoadGaussian() {
372 jobParser.readTag();
373 rvec propagation{0., 0., 1.};
374 cvec polarisation{1., 0., 0.};
375 rvec focus_position{0., 0., 0.};
376 double waist = real(vacuumWavelength);
377 int domainIndex(0);
378 while (jobParser.lastRead() != "/gaussian") {
379 if (jobParser.getTag() == "propagation") {
380 double p1(jobParser.read<double>());
381 double p2(jobParser.read<double>());
382 double p3(jobParser.read<double>());
383 propagation = p1, p2, p3;
384 jobParser.readTag();
385 }
386
387 if (jobParser.getTag() == "polarization") {
388 dcmplx p1(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
389 dcmplx p2(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
390 dcmplx p3(jobParser.read<dcmplx>());
391 polarisation = p1, p2, p3;
392 jobParser.readTag();
393 }
394
395 if (jobParser.getTag() == "focus_position") {
396 double p1(jobParser.read<double>());
397 double p2(jobParser.read<double>());
398 double p3(jobParser.read<double>());
399 focus_position = p1, p2, p3;
400 jobParser.readTag();
401 }
402
403 if (jobParser.getTag() == "waist_size") {
404 double w(jobParser.read<double>());
405 waist = w;
406 jobParser.readTag();
407 }
408
409 if (jobParser.getTag() == "domain") {
410 int din(jobParser.read<int>());
411 domainIndex = din;
412 jobParser.readTag();
413 }
414 jobParser.readTag();
415 }
416
417 domains[domainIndex]->AddGaussian(real(vacuumWavelength), waist,
418 focus_position, propagation, polarisation);
419 std::cout << "Adding paraxial Gaussian to the domain " << domainIndex
420 << std::endl;
421 return 0;
422}
423
424// Read @f$<periodic>@f$ (Bloch vector + lattice vectors) for periodic jobs.
425int SimJob::LoadPeriodicity() {
426 jobParser.readTag();
427 while (jobParser.lastRead() != "/periodic") {
428 if (jobParser.getTag() == "bloch") {
429 double f1(jobParser.read<double>());
430 double f2(jobParser.read<double>());
431 double f3(jobParser.read<double>());
432 blochVector = f1, f2, f3;
433 jobParser.readTag();
434 }
435 if (jobParser.getTag() == "lattice") {
436 double f1(jobParser.read<double>());
437 double f2(jobParser.read<double>());
438 double f3(jobParser.read<double>());
439 rvec lat(f1, f2, f3);
440 latticeVectors.push_back(lat);
441 jobParser.readTag();
442 }
443 jobParser.readTag();
444 }
445 return 0;
446}
447
448// Allocate and zero RHS vector; append to lseVectors.
449int SimJob::CreateLSEVec() {
450 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *vector =
451 new blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1>(2 * mesh->EdgeCount());
452 *vector = 0;
453 lseVectors.push_back(vector);
454 return 0;
455}
456
457// Allocate and zero solution vector; append to solVectors.
458int SimJob::CreateSolVec() {
459 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *vector =
460 new blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1>(2 * mesh->EdgeCount());
461 *vector = 0;
462 solVectors.push_back(vector);
463 return 0;
464}
465
466// Allocate Z (and ∂Z/∂p_i if Casimir path); set to zero.
467int SimJob::CreateLSEMatrix() {
468 lseMatrix =
469 new blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2>(2 * mesh->EdgeCount(), 2 * mesh->EdgeCount(),
470 blitz::ColumnMajorArray<2>());
471 *lseMatrix = 0;
472 if (isCasimirJob) {
473 for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
474 lseGradientMatrix[i] = new blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2>(
475 2 * mesh->EdgeCount(), 2 * mesh->EdgeCount(),
476 blitz::ColumnMajorArray<2>());
477 *(lseGradientMatrix[i]) = 0;
478 }
479 }
480 return 0;
481}
482
483// External conjugate gradient and LU routines
484extern "C" {
501 void cgsqr_(dcmplx *ca, dcmplx *cy, dcmplx *cx, int *mxn, int *n, double *err,
502 int *mxiter, int *iter, float *time);
503
514 void zgetrf_(int *dim1, int *dim2, dcmplx *a, int *lda, int *ipiv, int *info);
515
529 void zgetrs_(char *TRANS, int *N, int *NRHS, dcmplx *A, int *LDA, int *IPIV,
530 dcmplx *B, int *LDB, int *INFO);
531}
532
544int JacobiPrecondition(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> *inMatrix,
545 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *inVector) {
546 int size(inVector->shape()(0) / 2);
547 for (int i = 0; i < 2 * size; i++) {
548 dcmplx multElem(1. / (*inMatrix)(i, i));
549 (*inVector)(i) *= multElem;
550 for (int j = 0; j < 2 * size; j++) {
551 (*inMatrix)(i, j) *= multElem;
552 }
553 }
554 return 0;
555}
556
561int SimJob::SolveLSE(int solverType) {
562 int error(0);
563 if (solverType == 1) {
564 int n(2 * mesh->EdgeCount()), maxIter(10000), nIter;
565 double err(1e-6);
566 float time(0);
567
568 std::cout << "Preconditioning...";
569 std::cout.flush();
570 JacobiPrecondition(lseMatrix, lseVectors.front());
571
572 std::cout << "Solving system with iterative solver...";
573 std::cout.flush();
574 cgsqr_(&((*lseMatrix)(0, 0)), &((*(lseVectors.front()))(0)),
575 &((*(solVectors.front()))(0)), &n, &n, &err, &maxIter, &nIter,
576 &time);
577 std::cout << "finished in " << nIter << " steps." << std::endl;
578 if (nIter > maxIter) error = 1;
579 }
580 else if (solverType == 0 || solverType == 2) {
581 std::cout << "Solving system with LU decomposition..." << std::endl;
582 int n(2 * mesh->EdgeCount());
583 blitz::Array<int, 1> iPiv(n);
584 int info(0);
585 int nRSides(lseVectors.size());
586 char trans = 'N';
587 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> rightSides(n, nRSides,
588 blitz::ColumnMajorArray<2>());
589 for (int i(0); i < nRSides; i++) {
590 rightSides(blitz::Range(0, n - 1), i) = *(lseVectors.at(i));
591 }
592 // Use lapack routines
593 zgetrf_(&n, &n, &((*lseMatrix)(0, 0)), &n, &(iPiv(0)), &info);
594 zgetrs_(&trans, &n, &nRSides, &((*lseMatrix)(0, 0)), &n, &(iPiv(0)),
595 &(rightSides(0, 0)), &n, &info);
596 for (int i(0); i < nRSides; i++) {
597 *(solVectors.at(i)) = rightSides(blitz::Range(0, n - 1), i);
598 }
599 }
600 return error;
601};
602
603// Write a Blitz vector to text.
604template <class T>
605int SimJob::WriteVectorToFile(std::string fileName,
606 blitz::Array<T, 1> *vector) {
607 std::ofstream fsol(fileName.c_str());
608 if (!fsol.is_open()) {
609 std::cout << "Error opening output file: " << fileName << std::endl;
610 return 1;
611 }
612 fsol << std::scientific;
613 fsol.precision(20);
614 for (int i = 0; i < vector->shape()(0); i++) {
615 fsol << (*vector)(i) << std::endl;
616 }
617 fsol.close();
618 return 0;
619}
620
621// Load a saved solution (.sol) into solVectors.back().
622int SimJob::LoadSolFromFile(std::string solFile) {
623 std::ifstream fsol(solFile.c_str());
624 if (!fsol.is_open()) {
625 std::cout << "Error opening solution file: " << solFile << std::endl;
626 return 1;
627 }
628 for (int i = 0; i < solVectors.back()->shape()(0); i++) {
629 dcmplx buf;
630 int err = ReadCommented<dcmplx>(&fsol, &buf);
631 if (err) {
632 std::cout << "Error reading solution file: " << solFile << " at position "
633 << i << std::endl;
634 fsol.close();
635 return 1;
636 }
637 (*solVectors.front())(i) = buf;
638 }
639 fsol.close();
640 return 0;
641}
642
643// Casimir force workflow
644int SimJob::Casimir(std::string jobFile, std::string outPrefix) {
645 isCasimirJob = true;
646
647 // Load primary job
648 jobParser.open(jobFile);
649 if (LoadFromFile()) return 1;
650
651 // Initialize formulations and fill LSE matrix
652 CreateLSEMatrix();
653 std::vector<Domain *>::iterator domIter;
654 for (domIter = domains.begin(); domIter != domains.end(); domIter++) {
655 (*domIter)->InitFormulation(vacuumWavelength);
656 (*domIter)->FillLSEMatrixAndGradient(lseMatrix, lseGradientMatrix);
657 }
658
659 // Finished reading jobs
660 jobParser.close();
661
662 int n(2 * mesh->EdgeCount());
663 blitz::Array<int, 1> iPiv(n);
664 int info(0);
665 zgetrf_(&n, &n, &((*lseMatrix)(0, 0)), &n, &(iPiv(0)), &info);
666 char trans = 'N';
667 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> force(3);
668 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> RWGforce(n);
669 std::string fileprefix = outPrefix + labels.at(0) + ".f";
670 for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
671 zgetrs_(&trans, &n, &n, &((*lseMatrix)(0, 0)), &n, &(iPiv(0)),
672 &((*(lseGradientMatrix[i]))(0, 0)), &n, &info);
673 for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) {
674 RWGforce(j) = (*(lseGradientMatrix[i]))(j, j) / (2. * PI);
675 force(i) += RWGforce(j);
676 }
677 char c='x'+i;
678 WriteVectorToFile(fileprefix + c, &RWGforce);
679 }
680 WriteVectorToFile(fileprefix + "xyz", &force);
681
682 // Clean up LSE
683 delete lseMatrix;
684 while (lseVectors.size() > 0) {
685 delete lseVectors.back();
686 delete solVectors.back();
687 lseVectors.pop_back();
688 solVectors.pop_back();
689 }
690 return 0;
691}
692
693// High-level run: parse job, build A and b, solve, and write outputs.
694int SimJob::Simulate(std::string jobFile, int solverType,
695 std::string outPrefix) {
696 // Load primary job
697 jobParser.open(jobFile);
698 if (LoadFromFile()) return 1;
699
700 // Initialize formulations and fill LSE matrix
701 CreateLSEMatrix();
702 std::vector<Domain *>::iterator domIter;
703 for (domIter = domains.begin(); domIter != domains.end(); domIter++) {
704 (*domIter)->InitFormulation(vacuumWavelength);
705 (*domIter)->FillLSEMatrix(lseMatrix);
706 }
707#ifdef DEBUG
708 dumpLSEMatrix(lseMatrix, "LSEMatrix.txt");
709#endif
710 // Fill LSE vectors for main job and subjobs
711 bool validJob(true);
712 while (validJob) {
713 CreateLSEVec();
714 CreateSolVec();
715 for (domIter = domains.begin(); domIter != domains.end(); domIter++) {
716 (*domIter)->FillLSEVector(lseVectors.back());
717 (*domIter)->ClearIncidentFields();
718 }
719#ifdef DEBUG
720 dumpLSEVector(lseVectors.back(), "LSEVector.txt");
721 for (int i = 0; i < lseVectors.back()->numElements(); i++) {
722 std::cout << "LSE vector element " << i << ": "
723 << (*lseVectors.back())(i) << std::endl;
724 }
725#endif
726 validJob = !LoadSubjobFromFile();
727 }
728
729 // Finished reading jobs
730 jobParser.close();
731
732 // Solve
733 if (SolveLSE(solverType) != 0) {
734 std::cout << "Iterative solver did not converge, using direct solver!"
735 << std::endl;
736 SolveLSE(0);
737 }
738
739 std::cout << "Writing solution file(s)..." << std::endl;
740
741 for (uint i(0); i < solVectors.size(); i++)
742 WriteVectorToFile(
743 std::string(outPrefix).append(labels.at(i)).append(".sol"),
744 solVectors.at(i));
745
746 // Clean up LSE
747 delete lseMatrix;
748 while (lseVectors.size() > 0) {
749 delete lseVectors.back();
750 delete solVectors.back();
751 lseVectors.pop_back();
752 solVectors.pop_back();
753 }
754 return 0;
755}
756
757// Find the containing domain for pos; returns background if none.
758Domain *SimJob::ContainingDomain(rvec pos) {
759 for (std::vector<Domain *>::iterator domIter = domains.begin();
760 domIter != domains.end(); domIter++)
761 if ((*domIter)->IsInside(pos)) return *domIter;
762 std::cout << "ERROR! Point " << pos
763 << " not found in domains, assuming background!" << std::endl;
764 return domains.at(0);
765}
766
767// {E_inc, E_scat} without pre-known domain.
768std::pair<cvec, cvec> SimJob::EField(rvec pos) {
769 Domain *inDom(ContainingDomain(pos));
770 if (inDom == NULL)
771 return std::pair<cvec, cvec>(cvec(0, 0, 0), cvec(0, 0, 0));
772 else
773 return std::pair<cvec, cvec>(inDom->IncFieldE(pos),
774 inDom->SecFieldE(solVectors.back(), pos));
775}
776
777// {E_inc, E_scat} wit pre-known domain.
778std::pair<cvec, cvec> SimJob::EField(rvec pos, Domain *inDom) {
779 return std::pair<cvec, cvec>(inDom->IncFieldE(pos),
780 inDom->SecFieldE(solVectors.back(), pos));
781}
782
783// {H_inc, H_scat} without pre-known domain.
784std::pair<cvec, cvec> SimJob::HField(rvec pos) {
785 Domain *inDom(ContainingDomain(pos));
786 if (inDom == NULL)
787 return std::pair<cvec, cvec>(cvec(0, 0, 0), cvec(0, 0, 0));
788 else
789 return std::pair<cvec, cvec>(inDom->IncFieldH(pos),
790 inDom->SecFieldH(solVectors.back(), pos));
791}
792
793// {H_inc, H_scat} with pre-known domain.
794std::pair<cvec, cvec> SimJob::HField(rvec pos, Domain *inDom) {
795 return std::pair<cvec, cvec>(inDom->IncFieldH(pos),
796 inDom->SecFieldH(solVectors.back(), pos));
797}
798
799// {{E_inc,H_inc},{E_scat,H_scat}} at @p pos within @p inDom.
800std::pair<std::pair<cvec, cvec>, std::pair<cvec, cvec>> SimJob::EandHField(
801 rvec pos, Domain *inDom) {
802 return make_pair(make_pair(inDom->IncFieldE(pos), inDom->IncFieldH(pos)),
803 inDom->SecFieldEandH(solVectors.back(), pos));
804}
805
806// Derived power using latest solution vector.
807double SimJob::Power(Domain *domain) {
808 return domain->Power(solVectors.back());
809}
810
811// Derived scattering cross section using latest solution vector.
812std::vector<double> SimJob::scatteringCS(Domain *domain) {
813 return domain->scatteringCS(solVectors.back());
814}
815
816// Derived absorption cross section using latest solution vector.
817double SimJob::absorptionCS(Domain *domain) {
818 return domain->absorptionCS(solVectors.back());
819}
820
821// Derived extinction cross section using latest solution vector.
822double SimJob::extinctionCS(Domain *domain) {
823 return domain->extinctionCS(solVectors.back());
824}
825
836int CleanUpFiles(std::map<const char *, std::ofstream *> files) {
837 for (std::map<const char *, std::ofstream *>::iterator itFile = files.begin();
838 itFile != files.end(); itFile++) {
839 itFile->second->close();
840 delete itFile->second;
841 }
842 files.clear();
843 return 0;
844}
845
851cvec ConjVec(cvec in) { return cvec(conj(in(0)), conj(in(1)), conj(in(2))); }
852
858rvec RealVec(cvec in) { return rvec(real(in(0)), real(in(1)), real(in(2))); }
859
860// Batch field evaluation over points from file; writes requested outputs.
861int SimJob::FieldEval(std::string jobFile, std::string posFile,
862 std::string outPrefix, uint fields, bool needsCS) {
863 // Load primary job
864 jobParser.open(jobFile);
865 if (LoadFromFile()) return 1;
866
867 CreateSolVec();
868 bool validJob(true);
869 while (validJob) {
870 std::string label = labels.back();
871 if(LoadSolFromFile(std::string(label).append(".sol"))) {
872 return 1;
873 }
874
875 // Map of field files
876 std::map<const char *, std::ofstream *> files;
877
878 // Add all needed field files
879 if (fields & EFIELD) {
880 files["fein"] = new std::ofstream(
881 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".ein").c_str());
882 files["fesc"] = new std::ofstream(
883 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".esc").c_str());
884 }
885 if (fields & HFIELD) {
886 files["fhin"] = new std::ofstream(
887 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".hin").c_str());
888 files["fhsc"] = new std::ofstream(
889 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".hsc").c_str());
890 }
891 if (fields & DFIELD) {
892 files["fdin"] = new std::ofstream(
893 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".din").c_str());
894 files["fdsc"] = new std::ofstream(
895 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".dsc").c_str());
896 }
897 if (fields & BFIELD) {
898 files["fbin"] = new std::ofstream(
899 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".bin").c_str());
900 files["fbsc"] = new std::ofstream(
901 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".bsc").c_str());
902 }
903 if (fields & POYVEC) {
904 files["fpin"] = new std::ofstream(
905 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".pin").c_str());
906 files["fpsc"] = new std::ofstream(
907 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".psc").c_str());
908 files["fpex"] = new std::ofstream(
909 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".pex").c_str());
910 }
911 if (fields & POWER) {
912 files["fpwr"] = new std::ofstream(
913 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".pwr").c_str());
914 }
915
916 // Check for output file errors
917 bool fileError(false);
918 for (std::map<const char *, std::ofstream *>::iterator itFile =
919 files.begin();
920 itFile != files.end(); itFile++)
921 fileError |= !(itFile->second->is_open());
922 if (fileError) {
923 std::cout << "Error opening output file!" << std::endl;
924 CleanUpFiles(files);
925 return 1;
926 }
927
928 // Calculate forces if desired (no need for points file)
929 if (fields & POWER && !needsCS) {
930 for (std::vector<Domain *>::iterator iDomain = domains.begin();
931 iDomain != domains.end(); iDomain++) {
932 double power = Power(*iDomain);
933 int index = (*iDomain)->Index();
934 *files["fpwr"] << index << ": " << power << std::endl;
935 }
936 }
937
938 // Are "pointwise" fields desired?
939 if (fields - POWER != 0 && !needsCS) {
940 std::cout << "checking points file" << std::endl;
941 // Check for points file
942 std::ifstream fpos(posFile.c_str());
943 if (!fpos.is_open()) {
944 std::cout << "Error opening input file: " << posFile << std::endl;
945 CleanUpFiles(files);
946 return 1;
947 }
948
949 // Determine required fields
950 bool needsE((fields & EFIELD) || (fields & DFIELD) || (fields & POYVEC));
951 bool needsH((fields & HFIELD) || (fields & BFIELD) || (fields & POYVEC));
952
953 // Compute and save fields
954 std::pair<cvec, cvec> efield;
955 std::pair<cvec, cvec> hfield;
956 std::vector<rvec> posvec;
957 int nPoint(0);
958 double x(0), y(0), z(0);
959 while (!(ReadCommented<double>(&fpos, &x) +
960 ReadCommented<double>(&fpos, &y) +
961 ReadCommented<double>(&fpos, &z))) {
962 posvec.push_back({x, y, z});
963 }
964 std::vector<std::pair<std::pair<cvec, cvec>, std::pair<cvec, cvec>>>
965 result(posvec.size());
966 std::vector<Domain *> contDom(posvec.size());
967 // If the domain is layered, create a new tabulated Green's function
968 // for fields calculation at the given observation points.
969 for (int i = 0; i < posvec.size(); ++i) {
970 contDom[i] = ContainingDomain(posvec[i]); assert(contDom[i] != nullptr);
971 if (contDom[i]->IsLayered() && contDom[i]->GetGrnFunLayeredFields() == nullptr) {
972 contDom[i]->newGrnFunLayered(posvec);
973 }
974 }
975 std::thread *th = new std::thread[threads - 1];
976 std::mutex mut;
977 for (int i = 0; i < threads - 1; ++i) {
978 th[i] = std::thread(&SimJob::FieldEvalParallel, this, std::ref(posvec),
979 needsE, needsH, std::ref(result), std::ref(contDom),
980 std::ref(nPoint), std::ref(mut));
981 }
982 FieldEvalParallel(posvec, needsE, needsH, result, contDom, nPoint, mut);
983 for (int i = 0; i < threads - 1; ++i) {
984 th[i].join();
985 }
986 delete[] th;
987
988 std::cout << "Evaluated " << nPoint << " points." << std::endl;
989 std::cout << "Writing fields" << std::endl;
990 for (int i = 0; i < nPoint; i++) {
991 if (needsE) {
992 efield = {result[i].first.first, result[i].second.first};
993 }
994 if (needsH) {
995 hfield = {result[i].first.second, result[i].second.second};
996 }
997 if (fields & EFIELD) {
998 *files["fein"] << efield.first(0) << " " << efield.first(1) << " "
999 << efield.first(2) << " " << std::endl;
1000 *files["fesc"] << efield.second(0) << " " << efield.second(1) << " "
1001 << efield.second(2) << " " << std::endl;
1002 }
1003 if (fields & HFIELD) {
1004 *files["fhin"] << hfield.first(0) << " " << hfield.first(1) << " "
1005 << hfield.first(2) << " " << std::endl;
1006 *files["fhsc"] << hfield.second(0) << " " << hfield.second(1) << " "
1007 << hfield.second(2) << " " << std::endl;
1008 }
1009 if (fields & DFIELD) {
1010 dcmplx epsilon = contDom[i]->Epsilon(posvec[i]) * EPS0;
1011 *files["fdin"] << efield.first(0) * epsilon << " "
1012 << efield.first(1) * epsilon << " "
1013 << efield.first(2) * epsilon << " " << std::endl;
1014 *files["fdsc"] << efield.second(0) * epsilon << " "
1015 << efield.second(1) * epsilon << " "
1016 << efield.second(2) * epsilon << " " << std::endl;
1017 }
1018 if (fields & BFIELD) {
1019 dcmplx mu = contDom[i]->Mu(posvec[i]) * MU0;
1020 *files["fbin"] << hfield.first(0) * mu << " " << hfield.first(1) * mu
1021 << " " << hfield.first(2) * mu << " " << std::endl;
1022 *files["fbsc"] << hfield.second(0) * mu << " "
1023 << hfield.second(1) * mu << " "
1024 << hfield.second(2) * mu << " " << std::endl;
1025 }
1026 if (fields & POYVEC) {
1027 rvec poyInc(RealVec(cross(efield.first, ConjVec(hfield.first))) / 2.);
1028 rvec poySca(RealVec(cross(efield.second, ConjVec(hfield.second))) /
1029 2.);
1030 rvec poyExt(RealVec(cross(efield.first, ConjVec(hfield.second)) +
1031 cross(efield.second, ConjVec(hfield.first))) /
1032 2.);
1033 *files["fpin"] << poyInc(0) << " " << poyInc(1) << " " << poyInc(2)
1034 << " " << std::endl;
1035 *files["fpsc"] << poySca(0) << " " << poySca(1) << " " << poySca(2)
1036 << " " << std::endl;
1037 *files["fpex"] << poyExt(0) << " " << poyExt(1) << " " << poyExt(2)
1038 << " " << std::endl;
1039 }
1040 }
1041 fpos.close();
1042 }
1043
1044 // Calculate scattering, absorption and extinction cross sections
1045 Domain* background = domains.front();
1046 if ( needsCS && !( background->hasDipoles() ) ){
1047 files["fcsc"] = new std::ofstream(
1048 std::string(outPrefix).append(label).append(".csc").c_str());
1049 std::vector<double> scaCS = scatteringCS(background);
1050 double absCS = absorptionCS(background);
1051 double extCS = extinctionCS(background);
1052 *files["fcsc"] << scaCS[0] << " " << absCS << " " << extCS << " " << scaCS[1] << std::endl;
1053 }
1054 CleanUpFiles(files);
1055
1056 for (std::vector<Domain *>::iterator domIter = domains.begin();
1057 domIter != domains.end(); domIter++)
1058 (*domIter)->ClearIncidentFields();
1059 background->ClearIncidentFields();
1060 validJob = !LoadSubjobFromFile();
1061 }
1062
1063 return 0;
1064}
1065
1066// Worker loop: pulls next point index under a mutex and fills results.
1067void SimJob::FieldEvalParallel(
1068 std::vector<rvec> &posvec, bool needsE, bool needsH,
1069 std::vector<std::pair<std::pair<cvec, cvec>, std::pair<cvec, cvec>>>
1070 &result,
1071 std::vector<Domain *> &contDom, int &nPoint, std::mutex &mut) {
1072 std::pair<cvec, cvec> efield;
1073 std::pair<cvec, cvec> hfield;
1074 std::pair<std::pair<cvec, cvec>, std::pair<cvec, cvec>> ehfield;
1075 while (1) {
1076 int i;
1077 {
1078 // Important : do not remove braces, they are there to block-scope mutex
1079 // lock
1080 std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mut);
1081 i = nPoint;
1082 if (i >= result.size()) break;
1083 if (++nPoint % 10 == 0) {
1084 std::cout << ".";
1085 std::cout.flush();
1086 }
1087 }
1088 if (needsE && needsH) {
1089 ehfield = EandHField(posvec[i], contDom[i]);
1090 result[i] = ehfield;
1091 } else if (needsE) {
1092 efield = EField(posvec[i], contDom[i]);
1093 result[i].first.first = efield.first;
1094 result[i].second.first = efield.second;
1095 } else if (needsH) {
1096 hfield = HField(posvec[i], contDom[i]);
1097 result[i].first.second = hfield.first;
1098 result[i].second.second = hfield.second;
1099 }
1100 }
1101}
1102
1103// Load binary lookup table for periodic Green's function helper.
1104int SimJob::LoadTableFromFile(std::string fileName) {
1105 std::cout << "Loading lookup table..." << std::endl;
1106 t = new LookupTableBin(fileName);
1107 thereIsALookupTable = true;
1108 return 0;
1109}
1110
1111// Global thread setting for SimJob helper routines.
1112int SimJob::threads = 1;
1113void SimJob::AssignThreads(int t) { threads = t; }
1114
1115// Dump A in a MATLAB friendly format.
1116void SimJob::dumpLSEMatrix(blitz::Array<dcmplx,2>* lseMatrix,
1117 const std::string &filename)
1118{
1119 if (!lseMatrix) {
1120 throw std::runtime_error("lseMatrix pointer is null");
1121 }
1122
1123 std::ofstream fout(filename);
1124 if (!fout.is_open()) {
1125 throw std::runtime_error("Could not open " + filename + " for writing");
1126 }
1127
1128 int M = lseMatrix->extent(0);
1129 int N = lseMatrix->extent(1);
1130
1131 fout << "A = [\n";
1132 for (int i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
1133 fout << " ";
1134 for (int j = 0; j < N; ++j) {
1135 dcmplx z = (*lseMatrix)(i,j);
1136 // write as real + imag*1i
1137 fout
1138 << std::real(z)
1139 << (std::imag(z) < 0 ? "" : "+")
1140 << std::imag(z) << "*1i";
1141 if (j < N-1) fout << " "; // space between entries
1142 }
1143 fout << ";\n"; // end of this row
1144 }
1145 fout << "];\n";
1146
1147 fout.close();
1148}
1149
1150// Dump RHS in a MATLAB friendly format.
1151void SimJob::dumpLSEVector(blitz::Array<dcmplx,1>* lseVector,
1152 const std::string &filename)
1153{
1154 if (!lseVector) {
1155 throw std::runtime_error("lseVector pointer is null");
1156 }
1157
1158 std::ofstream fout(filename);
1159 if (!fout.is_open()) {
1160 throw std::runtime_error("Could not open " + filename + " for writing");
1161 }
1162
1163 int M = lseVector->extent(0);
1164
1165 fout << "v = [ ";
1166 for (int i = 0; i < M; ++i) {
1167 dcmplx z = (*lseVector)(i);
1168 fout
1169 << std::real(z)
1170 << (std::imag(z) < 0 ? "" : "+")
1171 << std::imag(z) << "*1i";
1172 if (i < M-1) fout << " "; // space between entries
1173 }
1174 fout << " ];\n";
1175
1176 fout.close();
1177}
DomainHom3DPer.h

Computes the LU factorization of a general M-by-N matrix.

Definition SimJob.cpp:23
